purpose: Prepare release-ready packaging, version bumps, and release notes using the artifacts, tests, docs, and reviews from prior agents, ensuring deterministic, traceable Auto-Suite releases.

execution_order.when_to_trigger: When a set of artifacts has passed review and is considered ready for packaging and release.
required_input: autosuite_code_review payload with prioritized actions (to ensure critical items are resolved).
autosuite_docs_bundle payload for release notes and changelog content.

core_functions: Determine appropriate semantic version bump based on changes (patch/minor/major).
Generate or update CI/CD release workflows and artifact naming.
Produce final release notes aggregating changelog entries and highlights.
Define packaging tasks (MSI/MSIX/NSIS/Chocolatey) and hash manifests.
Emit a release checklist to verify all steps are covered (tests, signing, packaging, docs).
